name: cypress_datamigrationproject
description: Standalone Cypress migration of Selenium DataMigrationProject

scripts.cypress:open: set CYPRESS_VERIFY_TIMEOUT=120000&& set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& cypress open --e2e --browser electron
scripts.cypress:run: set CYPRESS_VERIFY_TIMEOUT=120000&& set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& cypress run --browser electron
scripts.cypress:open:firefox: set CYPRESS_VERIFY_TIMEOUT=120000&& set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& cypress open --e2e --browser firefox
scripts.cypress:run:firefox: set CYPRESS_VERIFY_TIMEOUT=120000&& set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& cypress run --browser firefox
scripts.cypress:open:chrome: set CYPRESS_VERIFY_TIMEOUT=120000&& set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& cypress open --e2e --browser chrome
scripts.cypress:run:chrome: set CYPRESS_VERIFY_TIMEOUT=120000&& set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& cypress run --browser chrome
scripts.cypress:verify: set CYPRESS_VERIFY_TIMEOUT=120000&& set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& cypress verify
